orgToken.title: Organization token
orgToken.description: Your FortDefend org ID or enrollment token from the Install devices page. Required for automatic enrollment on managed Chromebooks.

groupId.title: Device group (optional)
groupId.description: If set, devices enroll into this group UUID. Leave empty for default group.

autoEnroll.title: Auto-enroll
autoEnroll.description: When true, the extension registers with the org as soon as it starts using orgToken from policy.
